params.name: Golden Finger
params.source:
* FTH Master Scrolls (31.5%), Fragment Crafting (15.1%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Master Scrolls (6.5%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.53%)
* Tap the rock in front of the garage 999 times
* Give [[Mailbox#Peter Jr.|Peter Jr.]] 20 0-star reviews in the same conversation
params.description:
On Aug 26, 2020 AD, a god gamer fainted from exhaustion.

After 999 taps, the legendary gamer overcame all odds and activated the power of the Golden Finger, launching a successful career in hacking. From then on, no game was ever a challenge. Gaming companies threatened to sue, but to no avail.
